debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

failed_attempts:
by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  obtain ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩ := H
  have : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by rw [h_eq]; exact hN
  simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at this
  obtain ⟨N', hN', hN_mem⟩ := this
  have hN_le_N' : N ≤ N' := by
    rw [hB N' hN']
    exact le_sSup hN_mem
  have hN'_le_N : N' ≤ N := by
    have : N' ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
      exact ⟨N', hN', le_sSup (hB' N' hN').sSup_mem (hB N' hN' ▸ le_refl N')⟩
    sorry
  sorry

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  obtain ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩ := H
  have : B N hN ⊆ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
  have hBN_sub_D : B N hN ⊆ D := by
    intro x hx
    exact h_eq ▸ this hx
  have hN_eq : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
  have : B N hN = {N} := by
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have hxD : x ∈ D := hBN_sub_D hx
      have hx_le_N : x ≤ N := by rw [hN_eq]; exact le_sSup hx
      have hN_le_x : N ≤ x := by
        by_contra h_neg
        push_neg at h_neg
        have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := 
          (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hx (Set.diff_subset) (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl)
        have h_sup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = x ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
          rw [← sSup_insert, Set.insert_diff_singleton, Set.insert_eq_of_mem hx]
        rw [hN_eq, h_sup_eq] at h_neg
        have : x ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ x := by
          apply sup_le le_rfl
          by_contra h_not_le
          push_neg at h_not_le
          have hx_ne_bot : x ≠ ⊥ := fun h => hB'' N hN (h ▸ hx)
          have : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≠ ⊥ := by
            intro h_eq_bot
            rw [h_eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at h_neg
            exact h_neg le_rfl
          sorry
        exact h_neg this
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      exact le_antisymm hx_le_N hN_le_x
    · intro hx
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
      subst hx
      have hB_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
        by_contra h_empty
        push_neg at h_empty
        simp only [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at h_empty
        rw [h_empty, sSup_empty] at hN_eq
        exact D.not_bot_mem (hN_eq ▸ hN)
      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hB_nonempty
      have hy_le : y ≤ N := by rw [hN_eq]; exact le_sSup hy
      have hyD : y ∈ D := hBN_sub_D hy
      sorry
  exact hBN this

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_
  intro h_eq
  obtain ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩ := H
  apply hBN
  ext x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have : x ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
      exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rw [h_eq] at this
    have hx_le : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    have hN_le : N ≤ x := by
      have hxD : x ∈ D := this
      have : Disjoint x (sSup (D.carrier \ {x})) := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hxD (Set.diff_subset) (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl)
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have hN_ne : N ≠ x := fun heq => h (heq ▸ le_refl _)
      have hN_in_diff : N ∈ D.carrier \ {x} := ⟨hN, Set.not_mem_singleton_iff.mpr hN_ne⟩
      have : N ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {x}) := le_sSup hN_in_diff
      have hx_le_sup : x ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {x}) := le_trans hx_le this
      have : x = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_self_le_right ‹Disjoint x (sSup (D.carrier \ {x}))› hx_le_sup
      exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hxD)
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    exact le_antisymm hx_le hN_le
  · intro hx
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rw [hx, hB N hN]
    have : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      simp only [Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem] at h
      have : sSup (B N hN) = ⊥ := by simp [h]
      rw [← hB N hN] at this
      exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
    obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := this
    exact le_sSup hb

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  obtain ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩ := H
  have : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by rw [h_eq]; exact hN
  simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at this
  obtain ⟨N', hN', hN_mem⟩ := this
  have hN_le : N ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hN_mem
  have hN'_le : N' ≤ N := by
    have : IsRefinement (refinement B hB hB' hB'') D := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
    rw [h_eq] at this
    obtain ⟨S, hS_sub, hS_eq⟩ := this hN'
    rw [hS_eq]
    apply sSup_le
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ D := hS_sub hx
    rw [← h_eq] at this
    simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at this
    obtain ⟨N'', hN'', hx_mem⟩ := this
    have hx_le : x ≤ N'' := by rw [hB N'' hN'']; exact le_sSup hx_mem
    by_cases hNN'' : N = N''
    · rw [← hNN'']; exact hx_le.trans hN_le
    · have hN'_in : N' ∈ D := hN'
      have hN''_in : N'' ∈ D := hN''
      have hdisj : Disjoint N' N'' := by
        have hne : N' ≠ N'' := by
          intro heq
          rw [heq] at hN_mem
          have : N ≤ N'' := by rw [hB N'' hN'']; exact le_sSup hN_mem
          have : N'' ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hN_mem
          exact hNN'' (le_antisymm ‹N ≤ N''› ‹N'' ≤ N›)
        exact (sSupIndep_pair hne).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (by simp [hN'_in, hN''_in]))
      have hN_le_inf : N ≤ N' ⊓ N'' := le_inf hN_le (by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hN_mem)
      have hN_bot : N ≤ ⊥ := hN_le_inf.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj)
      simp only [le_bot_iff] at hN_bot
      exact absurd (hN_bot ▸ hN) D.not_bot_mem
  have hN_eq : N = N' := le_antisymm hN_le hN'_le
  subst hN_eq
  apply hBN
  ext x
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have : x ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hx⟩⟩
    rw [h_eq] at this
    have hx_le : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    by_cases hxN : x = N
    · exact hxN
    · have hdisj : Disjoint x N := (sSupIndep_pair hxN).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (by simp [this, hN]))
      have : x ≤ ⊥ := hx_le.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp (disjoint_comm.mp hdisj))
      simp only [le_bot_iff] at this
      exact absurd (this ▸ hx) (hB'' N hN)
  · intro hx
    rw [hx, ← hB N hN]
    have hN_ne_bot : N ≠ ⊥ := fun h => D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN)
    have : B N hN ≠ ∅ := by
      intro hempty
      rw [hempty] at hB
      simp only [sSup_empty] at hB
      exact hN_ne_bot (hB N hN)
    obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
    have : y ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hy
    have hy_ne_bot : y ≠ ⊥ := fun h => hB'' N hN (h ▸ hy)
    have : y ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hy⟩⟩
    rw [h_eq] at this
    by_cases hyN : y = N
    · rw [← hyN]; exact hy
    · have hdisj : Disjoint y N := (sSupIndep_pair hyN).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (by simp [this, hN]))
      have : y ≤ ⊥ := (by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hy).trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp (disjoint_comm.mp hdisj))
      simp only [le_bot_iff] at this
      exact absurd this hy_ne_bot

        exact le_sSup hx
      have hN_le : N ≤ x := by
        by_contra h_neg
        push_neg at h_neg
        have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) :=

          rw [← sSup_insert, Set.insert_diff_singleton, Set.insert_eq_of_mem hx]

          rw [heq, sup_bot_eq] at this

        have hle : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := by

      exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (le_antisymm hx_le hN_le)

      subst hx

        rw [hempty, sSup_empty] at hN_eq
        have : N = ⊥ := hN_eq
        exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne
      have : y ≤ N := by rw [hN_eq]; exact le_sSup hy

by
  constructor
  · exact refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  · intro h_eq
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩ := H
    have h_mem : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      rw [h_eq]
      exact hN
    simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h_mem
    obtain ⟨N', hN', hN_in_B⟩ := h_mem
    have h_N_le_N' : N ≤ N' := by
      rw [hB N' hN']
      exact le_sSup hN_in_B
    have h_N'_le_N : N' ≤ N := by
      have : N' ≤ sSup D := le_sSup hN'
      have h_N_in_D : N ∈ (D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := hN
      have h_N'_in_D : N' ∈ (D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := hN'
      by_contra h_not_le
      have h_ne : N' ≠ N := fun h => h_not_le (le_of_eq h)
      have h_disj : Disjoint N' N := by
        exact (sSupIndep_pair h_ne).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (by simp [h_N_in_D, h_N'_in_D]))
      have h_N_bot : N = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (disjoint_comm.mp h_disj) h_N_le_N'
      exact D.not_bot_mem (h_N_bot ▸ hN)
    have h_eq_N : N' = N := le_antisymm h_N'_le_N h_N_le_N'
    subst h_eq_N
    have h_B_eq : B N hN = B N hN' := by
      congr
    rw [← h_B_eq] at hN_in_B
    have h_singleton : B N hN = {N} := by
      apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
      constructor
      · exact hN_in_B
      · intro x hx
        have h_x_le : x ≤ N := by
          rw [hB N hN]
          exact le_sSup hx
        have h_N_le_x : N ≤ x := by
          rw [hB N hN]
          exact le_sSup hN_in_B
        by_contra h_ne
        have h_disj : Disjoint x N := by
          exact hB' N hN x hx N hN_in_B h_ne
        have h_bot : N = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (disjoint_comm.mp h_disj) h_x_le
        exact D.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)
    exact hBN h_singleton

  intro h_eq

  have : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    rw [h_eq]
    exact hN
  simp only [refinement, SetLike.mem_coe, Set.mem_iUnion] at this
  obtain ⟨N', hN', hN'mem⟩ := this
  have hle : N ≤ N' := by
    rw [hB N' hN']
    exact le_sSup hN'mem
  have hle' : N' ≤ N := by
    have : N' ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      simp only [refinement, SetLike.mem_coe, Set.mem_iUnion]
      exact ⟨N', hN', hN'mem⟩
    rw [h_eq] at this
    have := RefinementMapLE D (refinement B hB hB' hB'') (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ⟨N', this⟩
    simp only [Subtype.coe_mk] at this
    have hN'inD : N' ∈ D := by rw [← h_eq]; exact ⟨N', hN', hN'mem⟩
    rw [hB N' hN'inD]
    exact le_sSup hN'mem
  have hNN' : N = N' := le_antisymm hle hle'
  subst hNN'
  have : B N hN = B N hN' := by congr
  rw [this] at hBN
  have hsingle : B N hN' = {N} := by
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have hxle : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN']; exact le_sSup hx
      have hNle : N ≤ x := by
        rw [hB N hN']
        apply sSup_le
        intro y hy
        by_contra hyx
        have : Disjoint x y := (hB' N hN').pairwise_disjoint hx hy (ne_of_not_le hyx).symm
        have hyle : y ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN']; exact le_sSup hy
        sorry
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      exact le_antisymm hxle hNle
    · intro hx
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
      subst hx
      rw [hB N hN'] at hN'mem
      sorry
  exact hBN hsingle

    have hN_eq : N = N' := le_antisymm hN_le hN'_le

      constructor

          exact le_sSup hx

          exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩

        have : x ≤ ⊥ := this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)

        exact hB'' N hN (this ▸ hx)

          exact ⟨N, hN, hy⟩
        rw [h_eq] at hy_in
        by_cases h_eq_N : y = N

          have : y ≤ y ⊓ N := le_inf le_rfl hy_le
          have : y ≤ ⊥ := this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)
          simp only [le_bot_iff] at this
          exact absurd (this ▸ hy) (hB'' N hN)
    exact hBN this

  have hN'_eq : N' = sSup (B N' hN') := hB N' hN'
  by_cases hNN' : N = N'
  · subst hNN'
    have : B N hN = B N hN' := by congr
    rw [this] at hBN
    have hsingle : B N hN' = {N} := by
      apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
      constructor
      · exact hN'mem
      · intro x hx
        have hxle : x ≤ sSup (B N hN') := le_sSup hx
        have hNle : N ≤ x := by
          by_contra hcon
          push_neg at hcon
          sorry
        sorry
    exact hBN hsingle
  · sorry
sorry
